scripts.start: cd docusaurus && npm run gen-all && npm run fix-mdx && npx docusaurus start
scripts.build: cd docusaurus && npm run gen-all && npm run fix-mdx && npx docusaurus build
scripts.gen-all: cd docusaurus && npx docusaurus gen-api-docs all
scripts.clean-all: cd docusaurus && npx docusaurus clean-api-docs all
